log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader with overlay capabilities. Get information about the types of IOCs (Indicators of Compromise) available in the report.
The report contains 2 dropped files, 26 created processes, but no network activity, registry persistence keys, or highlighted API calls. Investigate the network activity in more detail.
There is no network activity in the report. Investigate the file system activity to see if the malware is writing any files or modifying existing ones.
The malware dropped two files, Mkjmno32.exe and Nffgfh32.dll. Investigate the registry changes to see if the malware is modifying any registry keys.
The malware does not appear to be using registry persistence. Investigate the process activity to see if the malware is spawning any suspicious processes or loading any suspicious modules.
